description: The Corsican mafia is a collective of criminal groups originating from Corsica, tied to both the French underworld and Italian organized crime. It operates in France, North Africa, and Latin America, engaging in activities such as drug trafficking, racketeering, and gambling. The group was involved in the French Connection heroin trafficking operation in the mid-20th century. Today, it consists of multiple families and gangs, including the Brise de Mer successors and the Petit Bar Gang.
